note: Codex Browser DOM-backed keyboard/accessibility audit. Native Tab key dispatch in this Browser session stuck on body, and the Browser DOM proxy did not expose HTMLElement.focus(), so this evidence verifies visible tabbable controls, accessible names, focus-visible classes, mobile overflow, and rendered route state rather than claiming a native Tab traversal.
cookieBannerNote: The current in-app Browser session did not render the cookie banner after localStorage/sessionStorage clearing on app or public routes; close-control accessibility is covered by component tests in this checkpoint.
